summary: Verified P0 bug fix for onboarding redirect issue. All 5 test scenarios passed - Student path, Parent path, Teacher path, Back button navigation, and Progress bar updates all working correctly. The stale closure fix in handleAnswer/handleComplete functions is working as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. The onboarding flow now correctly redirects after completing all 3 questions. The fix involved computing updatedAnswers in handleAnswer and passing directly to handleComplete(updatedAnswers) instead of relying on stale closure state. Also added isCompleting loading state to prevent double-clicks.

student_path.localStorage: onboardingData correctly persisted with {userType:'Student', level:'beginner', schedule:'fixed'}

parent_path.localStorage: onboardingData correctly persisted with {userType:'Parent', level:'slow', schedule:'flexible'}

teacher_path.notes: Does not go through steps 2 and 3 as expected

back_button_navigation.test_steps: Back at Step 1 -> Home, Back at Step 2 -> Step 1, Back at Step 3 -> Step 2

progress_bar.test_steps: Progress bar correctly updates at each step (1/3, 2/3, 3/3)

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: After completing onboarding questions, app did not redirect to sign-up page
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Stale closure issue - handleComplete was using outdated answers state instead of latest values
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Computing updatedAnswers in handleAnswer and passing directly to handleComplete(updatedAnswers). 2) Added isCompleting loading state to prevent double-clicks and show loading spinner. 3) Using functional update for setStep.
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: FIXED - All paths now correctly redirect to appropriate pages

mocked_integrations.stripe_payment: MOCKED - Not relevant to this test
